stimulus: Although researchers identified a stretch of DNA on the deep-sea tubeworm chromosome that resembles the genes regulating limb growth in vertebrates, the sequence appears to be ______blank in tubeworms: transcribed only rarely and producing no observable change in the worm’s body plan.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer because “quiescent” means inactive or at rest, which fits the negation frame “transcribed only rarely and producing no observable change.” The sequence is present in the tubeworm genome but is not doing anything observable—exactly the meaning of quiescent.

Choice A is incorrect because the text explicitly says researchers “identified” the sequence on the chromosome, so it is not absent. Choice C is incorrect because “fluctuating” implies the sequence changes its activity level, but the text describes a consistently inactive state, not variability. Choice D is incorrect because “pivotal” means crucially influential, the opposite of what the negation frame (“no observable change”) establishes.
